svg.aria-label: The Estate, sheet A-201: four detailed heritage elevations with a proposed technology retrofit shown in red. The Conservatory with solar glass is Harmonic Conservatory. The Studio with an antenna array is Chord Architect. The Gatehouse with a sensor curtain is Operation Nexus. The Observatory with a data dish is Score Analyser. An underground fibre ring links all buildings to reserved Plot five.
svg.text: SHEET A-201 · ESTATE ELEVATIONS · HERITAGE FABRIC + PROPOSED RETROFIT
ONE BUILDING PER WORK · NATURE KEPT · NEW SERVICES SHOWN IN RED
SITE & GROUNDS: BSc SECURITY STUDIES · LEIDEN UNIVERSITY, THE HAGUE | ADV. DIPLOMA SOUND ENGINEERING · ABBEY ROAD INSTITUTE AMS
